description: A new product requires a certificate of compliance from the supplier before it can be sold. An agent must obtain this document.

nodes.task_description: Identify the new product and its compliance requirements.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms a specific compliance certificate is needed.

nodes.task_description: Contact the supplier and request the required certificate.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a formal request to the supplier.

nodes.task_description: Receive the certificate and upload it to the compliance management system, linking it to the product.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully receives and archives the compliance document.
